function.name: analyze_files
function.description: Reads index.html, styles.css, script.js, and plan.md files and returns their contents for analysis

args.description: Optional arguments (not used, can be empty string)

function.name: update_html
function.description: Writes content to index.html file (creates or overwrites existing file)

content.description: HTML content to write to index.html

function.name: update_css
function.description: Writes content to styles.css file (creates or overwrites existing file)

content.description: CSS content to write to styles.css

function.name: update_js
function.description: Writes content to script.js file (creates or overwrites existing file)

content.description: JavaScript content to write to script.js
